channel.title: jb-marketplace-plugins-jetbrains
channel.description: The latest JetBrains plugins on the JetBrains marketplace
channel.dc:creator: Jonathan Lermitage

item.title: GitLab MR - Tue Apr 14 03:45:24 UTC 2026
item.description:
View and manage GitLab Merge Requests directly within IntelliJ IDEA. Supports listing, filtering, creating, merging, and closing MRs without leaving the IDE. 在...
vendor: Nathan Ye downloads: 0 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.nathan.gitlabmr

item.title: Nushell Object Notation - Mon Apr 13 03:39:31 UTC 2026
item.description:
Provides support for NUON (Nushell Object Notation) files. Features: Syntax highlighting Code formatting Brace matching Commenter support.
vendor: Anbora Labs downloads: 2 pricingModel: PAID xmlId: co.anbora.labs.nuon

item.title: GALA - Tue Apr 14 06:49:47 UTC 2026
item.description:
IDE support for GALA — a modern functional language that transpiles to Go, combining Go's runtime and ecosystem with ideas from Scala and other ML-family languages...
vendor: GALA downloads: 0 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: org.gala.lang

item.title: WLZN API SYNC - Tue Apr 14 08:20:26 UTC 2026
item.description:
Torna API Sync - Spring MVC API documentation push tool. 将 Spring MVC 接口定义一键同步到 Torna 接口文档平台。 功能特性： - 自动解析 Controller 方法的请求参数、返回值、注解描述等元数据 - 一键推送接口文档到 Torna 平台，支持覆盖更新...
vendor: HWL downloads: 0 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.hwl.syncApi

item.title: AI Chat Assistant - Tue Apr 14 08:23:39 UTC 2026
item.description:
An AI-powered chat assistant for PyCharm. Ask questions about your code and get instant answers.
